name: zinput_joystick_apply_axis_config
description: zInput::DI_ApplyAxisConfig applies range/deadzone settings, computes midpoint/normalization for active joystick axes, and caches the axis configuration.
known_limits: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob1 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?DI_ApplyAxisConfig@zInput@@YIHPAUJoystickAxisConfig@1@@Z at 0x471fd0 still fails: 420 unmasked mismatches, 28 relocation bytes masked, 11 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, BN size 463 bytes, VC object symbol size 144 bytes.

Reviewed difference is source/codegen shape: current source factors per-axis work through ApplyAxisConfigEntry, while Binary Ninja shows an expanded per-axis body. The targeted smoke verifies caller-visible DirectInput property calls, axis fallback behavior, midpoint/normScale computation, cached config copy, and null-config return.
